tokenizer_fidelity.instruction: Tokenize each 'text' in Dart using WordPieceTokenizer with the MiniLM vocab. Apply [CLS]/[SEP] wrapping, truncate to 128, pad with [PAD]=0. Assert element-wise equality of 'input_ids' for all 20 samples.
